title: FIRRTL to HW lowering involving type alias of bundle fails with "error: 'hw.struct_extract' op used as connect destination"

features.name: struct typedef with subfield lvalue access
features.description: Code should include a struct type with subfield access used as an assignment target (lvalue)

features.name: struct alias type port with field connect
features.description: Code should include a module with ports using a struct type alias, where subfields are connected/assigned
